args.message: Of course! When I say "minor," I mean that the damage was largely cosmetic rather than structural—mostly just the front bumper and grill area, which were replaced. The work was done by a reputable local shop, Auto Fix Pros. Unfortunately, I don’t have the invoices on hand, but I can assure you that everything was professionally taken care of, and the Jeep has since passed thorough inspections. It's been running strong and hasn't shown any signs of issues from the repair.
